hero.title: FISORA
hero.subtitle: The best of Algerian nature, pure and artisanal.

about.title: Tradition & Purity
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.mission_text: FISORA values natural flavors through carefully dried fruit, vegetable, and plant powders. Our mission is to offer simple, natural, and practical products for everyday cooking and beverages.
about.story_text: The adventure began with a simple idea: capturing the essence of Algerian nature in a practical format without losing a bit of its richness. Each pouch of FISORA tells a story of patience, sun, and respect for the earth.

process.title: Our Quality Process
process.step1_desc: We choose only the best fruits and plants, harvested at perfect maturity.
process.step2_desc: A slow low-temperature process to preserve vitamins and aromas.
process.step3_desc: An artisanal transformation to obtain a powder of exceptional fineness.

products.title: Our Essences
products.subtitle: A rigorous selection of natural powders to enhance your everyday cooking.

usages.title: The Art of Using Our Powders
usages.subtitle: Creative Inspirations
usages.culinary_desc: Enhance your dishes and marinades with the aromatic intensity of our natural powders.
usages.beverages_desc: Add a touch of freshness to your teas, smoothies, and detox waters in an instant.
usages.wellness_desc: Enjoy the benefits of dried plants and fruits for your daily health routine.
usages.lemon_desc: A pinch in your cold water for an instant detox and energizing drink.
usages.orange_desc: Enhance your cakes and biscuits with the aromatic intensity of dried orange.
usages.mint_desc: Get the authentic taste of mint tea in an instant, without fresh leaves.
usages.cooking_desc: Garlic and onion powder for marinades and sauces with deep, authentic flavor.
usages.recipes_desc: Let your imagination run wild for 100% healthy culinary creations.

contact.title: Let's Talk Nature
contact.subtitle: Contact Us
contact.desc: A question? A project? We are here to advise you on our natural products.

footer.brand_desc: The quintessence of Algerian nature, transformed with passion and expertise to enhance your culinary creations.

showcase.title: Design & Purity
showcase.subtitle: Our Showcase
showcase.desc: A premium aluminium doypack (90x150 mm) designed to preserve the freshness and intense aromas of our natural powders.

seo.home_desc: Discover the best of Algerian nature with our natural dried fruit, vegetable, and plant powders. Pure, artisanal, and 100% natural.
seo.products_desc: Explore our range of natural powders: Lemon, Orange, Mint, Garlic, and Onion. Absolute purity for your recipes.
seo.about_desc: The story of FISORA, our mission to promote Algerian terroir, and our artisanal drying process.
seo.contact_desc: Contact FISORA for any questions about our natural products or collaborations.

steps.title: The Fresh Harvest
steps.desc: Vibrant Mediterranean oranges picked at peak ripeness, bursting with natural sugars and essential oils.
steps.caption: Fresh whole oranges

steps.title: Careful Preparation
steps.desc: Oranges are washed, inspected, and sliced to uniform thickness for perfectly even dehydration.
steps.caption: Sliced & prepared

steps.title: Slow Dehydration
steps.desc: Gentle heat removes water over 18–24 hours, protecting volatile aroma compounds and vitamins.
steps.caption: Gentle drying in progress

steps.title: Flavor Concentration
steps.desc: As water evaporates, flavor compounds intensify. Every gram carries the punch of a whole orange.
steps.caption: Essence concentrated

steps.title: FISORA Orange Powder
steps.desc: Shelf-stable, intensely flavored, ready for premium food and beverage applications worldwide.
steps.caption: FISORA ready
